data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding agent-specific rate limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that such rate limits are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case describes the intended behavior of the system but lacks concrete evidence that the system adheres to the specific requirement of having different rate limits for agents compared to human users. Therefore, the validation process is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of agent-specific rate limits being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the agent-specific rate limits.
